about: Experienced backend engineer specializing in building scalable microservices architecture. Passionate about clean code, system design, and mentoring junior developers. Strong proficiency in .NET, cloud platforms, and distributed systems.

experience.title: Senior Backend Engineer
experience.description: Led design and implementation of microservices architecture serving 10M+ users. Mentored team of 5 engineers and improved system performance by 40%.

experience.title: Backend Engineer
experience.description: Developed RESTful APIs and microservices using ASP.NET Core. Implemented CI/CD pipelines and containerized applications with Docker and Kubernetes.

experience.title: Junior Developer
experience.description: Built backend services and database solutions. Collaborated with frontend team to deliver features and resolve production issues.
